case_title: PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C. VS. STANLEY LOVELACE et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C. AS TO DEFENDANT LOVELACE, STANLEY DOES 1 THROUGH 15 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-17-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-12-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-02-2006
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 15 INCLUSIVE

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT CCP 585; ATTY. FEES AND COSTS CCP 1033 , COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS EVID 1550 . FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOVELACE, STANLEY $2,227.98 PRINCIPAL, $265.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,492.98, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX )
